headline: Olin Stock Sees Relative Strength Rating Jump To 83
summary: On Tuesday, Olin stock cleared a noteworthy performance benchmark, with its Relative Strength (RS) Rating jumping into the 80-plus percentile with an upgrade to 83, a rise from 79 the day before.    Looking For The Best Stocks To Buy And Watch? Start Here  IBD's proprietary rating identifies market leadership with a 1 (worst) to 99 (best) score.

headline: 5 Stocks to Buy Now That The Strait of Hormuz is Closed
summary: The military conflict and resulting closure of the Strait of Hormuz have created specific, second-wave investment opportunities in companies that address critical bottlenecks in global energy, defense materials, and shipping logistics.
